changeLog: Offline cache enabled for all maps, Pro Tracker V1.1.9, Incl Cold-Start Anti-Spike filtering for older, newer phones. The instl will download the app-release file inside the itrl folder. User needs to instl that downloaded app-release apk file from the downloaded itrl folder. As it is a BD local product, user needs to give, auth all the access, permission to instl the new version app-release apk. This will update the present version. 23 May 2026.
